title: Insanely Optimized Plus
description: Modpack with the best optimization mods and lots of useful extra features
body:
# Insane Performance Plus 1.0 for 1.20.1 dropped now!
Simply the best optimized minecraft with several useful extra features such as:

- Minimap (When playing on servers I recommend disabling it if you don't know if it's enabled. You can change it in the modmenu)
- Advancement Plaques
- Better Ping Display
- Better Statistic Screen
- Capes
- Improved display of activity on Discord
- Eating animation
- Player heads in chat
- Much better tooltips
- Adding missing animations in the game (some of them are imported from bedrock version)
- Shulkerbox tooltip
- 3D skin layers
- voicechat
- A few minor visual improvements that don't degrade performance
- Optifine features (shaders, animated and connected textures, zoom and more)
- Recording, replaying, exporting and sharing your records directly in the game
